questions.prompt:
An algorithm is required to calculate the total rainfall recorded in a 30-day month.

Write a Python program to:
  • prompt the user to enter the rainfall for each day in millimetres
  • repeat this input process for 30 days
  • calculate the total rainfall for the month
  • output the total rainfall in an appropriate message
questions.explanation:
Format:
total = 0
for i in range(30):
    rainfall = float(input('Enter rainfall: '))
    total += rainfall
print('Total rainfall:', total)
